title: Bootstrap Adoption and Project-Calibrated Complexity Review Plan

sources.reason: User-provided review/specification for Bootstrap Adoption, Project Configuration, and calibrated complexity.
Historical remediation plan and lifecycle requirements.
Canonical Work Item, preflight, archive, PR, and closure workflow.
Canonical governance terminology and architecture boundary.

problemStatement: The supplied review requires a new execution plan that separates Bootstrap Adoption, Project Configuration, and Governed Development and makes every remediation Work Item independently closable.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Review requirements are represented in the plan
Every Work Item includes PR merge, closure, branch cleanup, and next-item sequencing
Production implementation of future Work Items
scenarioCoverage.reason: This Work Item authors the plan only.

riskAssessment.reason: This Work Item is limited to an execution plan and governance records; production implementation risks are deferred to future Work Item Contracts.

executionDecision.reason: The requested deliverable is an implementation plan; no production implementation is authorized by this Work Item.

preReviewWarnings: Review that the four user-specified closing Work Items are last and that every Work Item requires PR merge, ai-close-work-item, branch cleanup, and base synchronization before the next Work Item.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The Contract explicitly records scope, outOfScope, sources, unknowns, acceptance, and verification for plan authoring.
The new plan summarizes the supplied review and decomposes it into ordered, independently closable Work Items.
The final Work Items cover delusion testing with iterative repair, documentation alignment, a new release, and execution-plan cleanup.
The plan requires Contract, Preflight, verification, Summary, ai-finish, PR, merge, ai-close-work-item, branch cleanup, and base synchronization for every Work Item.
The plan records user authorization and separates authorization from evidence that must be produced during execution.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The review adds a complete adoption and calibration lifecycle that is not represented by the historical remediation plan.
constraints: Keep the user-specified four closing Work Items last.
Do not claim future implementation, PR, or release evidence as completed.
intent.rationale: A new plan is required because the existing 2026-07-21 plan is explicitly historical and must not be rewritten.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized completing the current document Work Item workflow, including its generated Preflight decision evidence.

rollbackNote: Revert only the new plan and this Work Item's active records; preserve historical plans, archived evidence, and unrelated user changes.
